TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-relatives_buya_ngengi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: tangi buya mawtuisu tapawanku.
S.PHON: taŋi βuja mawtuisu tapawanku.
S.FORM: tangi buya mawtuisu tapawanku.
S.PHON: taŋi βuja mawtuisu tapawanku.
S.TRANSL: 今天, Buya, 你來我家.
Today, Buya, you came to my home.

S.FORM: nengiti mlizaq aiku.
S.PHON: nəŋiti mriz~raq aiku.
S.FORM: nengiti mlizaq aiku.
S.PHON: nəŋiti mriz~raq aiku.
S.TRANSL: 很好,我很高興.

TRANSL.notes: (It's) good. I am happy.

S.TRANSL: good. I am happy.

S.FORM: qawtuansu mlawut ya ay aiku ya qaqasu haw.
S.PHON: qawtuansu mrawut ja aj aiku ja qaqasu haw.
S.FORM: qawtuansu mlawut ya ay aiku ya qaqasu haw.
S.PHON: qawtuansu mrawut ja aj aiku ja qaqasu haw.
S.TRANSL: 你來拜訪我,你的姊姊.
You came to visit me, your sister.

S.FORM: maiiku tu nianu saiza buya.
S.PHON: maiiku tu nianu saiz~ra βuja.
S.FORM: maiiku tu nianu saiza buya.
S.PHON: maiiku tu nianu saiz~ra βuja.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有什麼.
I have nothing.

S.FORM: nengiti angtangisi qanpaita saRabi saiza patawsipaita zinku ya.
S.PHON: nəŋiti aŋtaŋisi qanpaita saʁaβi saiz~ra patawsipaita z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: nengiti angtangisi qanpaita saRabi saiza patawsipaita zinku ya.
S.PHON: nəŋiti aŋtaŋisi qanpaita saʁaβi saiz~ra patawsipaita z~rinku ja.
S.TRANSL: 沒關係.等會,我們一起吃晚餐,我們喝酒,我說
It doesn't matter. Later, we will eat dinner and we will drink, said I.

S.FORM: kwa ya.
S.PHON: kwa ja.
S.FORM: kwa ya.
S.PHON: kwa ja.
S.TRANSL: 好的.
Okay.

S.FORM: tengnestiiku mai mawtu XXXX msiqaziku qaya tu.
S.PHON: təŋnəstiiku mai mawtu **** msiqaz~riku qaja tu.
S.FORM: tengnestiiku mai mawtu XXXX msiqaziku qaya tu.
S.PHON: təŋnəstiiku mai mawtu **** msiqaz~riku qaja tu.
S.TRANSL: 我很久沒來,我也不好意思.
I haven't come for a long time. I feel sorry too.

S.FORM: mzaqiita ma tengnes ma qawqa mawtu qausiq.
S.PHON: mz~raqiita ma təŋnəs ma qawqa mawtu qausiq.
S.FORM: mzaqiita ma tengnes ma qawqa mawtu qausiq.
S.PHON: mz~raqiita ma təŋnəs ma qawqa mawtu qausiq.

TRANSL.notes: 我們(住的)近, (但)我很久才來一次.

S.TRANSL: 我們 近, 我很久才來一次.

TRANSL.notes: We (lived) nearby, (but) I come here once in a while.

S.TRANSL: We nearby, I come here once in a while.

S.FORM: maiita mlawut XXXX sukawti tu qaqaqa haw en.
S.PHON: maiita mrawut **** sukawti tu qaqaqa haw ən.
S.FORM: maiita mlawut XXXX sukawti tu qaqaqa haw en.
S.PHON: maiita mrawut **** sukawti tu qaqaqa haw ən.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒去拜訪, 對姊姊們不好.

TRANSL.notes: We do not visit (them), (and) it is bad for sisters.

S.TRANSL: We do not visit , it is bad for sisters.

S.FORM: nayau saizi.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ri.
S.FORM: nayau saizi.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ri.
S.TRANSL: 這樣也是.
That's right.

S.FORM: m aita qenaswani iza haw qena qenaswani azu titiana qa qawman yauti aiku haw tanian qenaswani wi lawutanku.
S.PHON: m aita qənaswani iz~ra haw qəna qənaswani az~ru titiana qa qawman jauti aiku haw tanian qənaswani wi rawutanku.
S.FORM: m aita qenaswani iza haw qena qenaswani azu titiana qa qawman yauti aiku haw tanian qenaswani wi lawutanku.
S.PHON: m aita qənaswani iz~ra haw qəna qənaswani az~ru titiana qa qawman jauti aiku haw tanian qənaswani wi rawutanku.
S.TRANSL: 親友不管在哪裡,很遠我也去拜訪.
No matter where the relatives live, I would visit them even it's far.

S.FORM: masang taqalinquan saiza.
S.PHON: masaŋ taqarinquan saiz~ra.
S.FORM: masang taqalinquan saiza.
S.PHON: masaŋ taqarinquan saiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 以前在花蓮.
In the past, in Hualien.

S.FORM: matiwiku sa taipak saiza.
S.PHON: matiwiku sa taipak saiz~ra.
S.FORM: matiwiku sa taipak saiza.
S.PHON: matiwiku sa taipak saiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 我去台北.
I went to Taipei.

S.FORM: sa jilung matiwita tmita tu qenaswanita zakaisu.
S.PHON: sa jiruŋ matiwita tmita tu qənaswanita z~rakaisu.
S.FORM: sa jilung matiwita tmita tu qenaswanita zakaisu.
S.PHON: sa jiruŋ matiwita tmita tu qənaswanita z~rakaisu.
S.TRANSL: 我們去看親戚,我這樣跟你講.
We went to see our relatives, I told you.

S.FORM: yau XXXX qabaqi sibaqiansu dalu titipil.
S.PHON: jau **** qaβaqi siβaqiansu ɮaru titipir.
S.FORM: yau XXXX qabaqi sibaqiansu dalu titipil.
S.PHON: jau **** qaβaqi siβaqiansu ɮaru titipir.
S.TRANSL: 還有你的長輩,Tipil.
There is you elder, Tipil.

S.FORM: lawutika qaya m.
S.PHON: rawutika qaja m.
S.FORM: lawutika qaya m.
S.PHON: rawutika qaja m.
S.TRANSL: 你去拜訪他.
Visit him.

S.FORM: matiwisu yauti bawutna yau Raqna.
S.PHON: matiwisu jauti βawutna jau ʁaqna.
S.FORM: matiwisu yauti bawutna yau Raqna.
S.PHON: matiwisu jauti βawutna jau ʁaqna.
S.TRANSL: 你去的話,他有魚他有酒.

TRANSL.notes: (If) you go, he has fish and he has wine.

S.TRANSL: you go, he has fish and he has wine.

S.FORM: yau saizi.
S.PHON: jau saiz~ri.
S.FORM: yau saizi.
S.PHON: jau saiz~ri.
S.TRANSL: 是有啊.
There is.

S.FORM: sapatawsianna timaisu zaka.
S.PHON: sapatawsianna timaisu z~raka.
S.FORM: sapatawsianna timaisu zaka.
S.PHON: sapatawsianna timaisu z~raka.
S.TRANSL: 是他要請你喝酒的.

TRANSL.notes: (these) are to treat you to drinking wine.

S.TRANSL: are to treat you to drinking wine.

S.FORM: XXXX qmRasti timaikuan.
S.PHON: **** qmʁasti timaikuan.
S.FORM: XXXX qmRasti timaikuan.
S.PHON: **** qmʁasti timaikuan.
S.TRANSL: 他也會叫我.
He will call me.

S.FORM: qatiwka zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: qatiwka z~rinnaiku nani.
S.FORM: qatiwka zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: qatiwka z~rinnaiku nani.
S.TRANSL: 他叫我去.
'Go,' he said to me.

S.FORM: XXXX en mana maiita tu lawal ka.
S.PHON: **** ən mana maiita tu rawar ka.
S.FORM: XXXX en mana maiita tu lawal ka.
S.PHON: **** ən mana maiita tu rawar ka.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有空閒.
We do not have free time.

S.FORM: azuti saRayRaynguti tu baqita tayan ti tipilan.
S.PHON: az~ruti saʁajʁajŋuti tu βaqita tajan ti tipiran.
S.FORM: azuti saRayRaynguti tu baqita tayan ti tipilan.
S.PHON: az~ruti saʁajʁajŋuti tu βaqita tajan ti tipiran.
S.TRANSL: 好像我們裝做不知道我們的長輩, Tipil.
It seems as if we did not know our elder, Tipil.

S.FORM: m siRap qatiwanku qaya qausiq nani.
S.PHON: m siʁap qatiwanku qaja qausiq nani.
S.FORM: m siRap qatiwanku qaya qausiq nani.
S.PHON: m siʁap qatiwanku qaja qausiq nani.
S.TRANSL: 之前,我去過一次.

TRANSL.notes: Not long ago, I went (there) once.

S.TRANSL: Not long ago, I went once.

S.FORM: yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jau taraz~ranan.
S.FORM: yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jau taraz~ranan.
S.TRANSL: 有在路邊.
By the road

S.FORM: sapatawsianna timaisu zaka.
S.PHON: sapatawsianna timaisu z~raka.
S.FORM: sapatawsianna timaisu zaka.
S.PHON: sapatawsianna timaisu z~raka.
S.TRANSL: 是他要請你喝酒的.

TRANSL.notes: (these) are to treat you to drinking wine.

S.TRANSL: are to treat you to drinking wine.

S.FORM: XXXX qmRasti timaikuan.
S.PHON: **** qmʁasti timaikuan.
S.FORM: XXXX qmRasti timaikuan.
S.PHON: **** qmʁasti timaikuan.
S.TRANSL: 他也會叫我.
He will call me.

S.FORM: qatiwka zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: qatiwka z~rinnaiku nani.
S.FORM: qatiwka zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: qatiwka z~rinnaiku nani.
S.TRANSL: 他叫我去.
'Go,' he said to me.

S.FORM: XXXX en mana maiita tu lawal ka.
S.PHON: **** ən mana maiita tu rawar ka.
S.FORM: XXXX en mana maiita tu lawal ka.
S.PHON: **** ən mana maiita tu rawar ka.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有空閒.
We do not have free time.

S.FORM: azuti saRayRaynguti tu baqita tayan ti tipilan.
S.PHON: az~ruti saʁajʁajŋuti tu βaqita tajan ti tipiran.
S.FORM: azuti saRayRaynguti tu baqita tayan ti tipilan.
S.PHON: az~ruti saʁajʁajŋuti tu βaqita tajan ti tipiran.
S.TRANSL: 好像我們裝做不知道我們的長輩, Tipil.
It seems as if we did not know our elder, Tipil.

S.FORM: m siRap qatiwanku qaya qausiq nani.
S.PHON: m siʁap qatiwanku qaja qausiq nani.
S.FORM: m siRap qatiwanku qaya qausiq nani.
S.PHON: m siʁap qatiwanku qaja qausiq nani.
S.TRANSL: 之前,我去過一次.

TRANSL.notes: Not long ago, I went (there) once.

S.TRANSL: Not long ago, I went once.

S.FORM: yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jau taraz~ranan.
S.FORM: yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jau taraz~ranan.
S.TRANSL: 有在路邊.
By the road.

S.FORM: Hm yau RiRaq qaniyau talazanan nani.
S.PHON: hm jau ʁiʁaq qanijau taraz~ranan nani.
S.FORM: Hm yau RiRaq qaniyau talazanan nani.
S.PHON: hm jau ʁiʁaq qanijau taraz~ranan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們在路邊喝酒.
They drank wine by the road.

S.FORM: ya tuqazka zinnaiku.
S.PHON: ja tuqaz~rka z~rinnaiku.
S.FORM: ya tuqazka zinnaiku.
S.PHON: ja tuqaz~rka z~rinnaiku.
S.TRANSL: '進來',他們對我說.
'Come in,' they said to me.

S.FORM: tmuqaztiimi ya.
S.PHON: tmuqaz~rtiimi ja.
S.FORM: tmuqaztiimi ya.
S.PHON: tmuqaz~rtiimi ja.
S.TRANSL: 我們就進去.
We went in.

S.FORM: yautiimi tayan silalaq XXXX silalaq silalaq silalaqti qaniyau ya atu kaputna nani.
S.PHON: jautiimi tajan siraraq **** siraraq siraraq siraraqti qanijau ja atu kaputna nani.
S.FORM: yautiimi tayan silalaq XXXX silalaq silalaq silalaqti qaniyau ya atu kaputna nani.
S.PHON: jautiimi tajan siraraq **** siraraq siraraq siraraqti qanijau ja atu kaputna nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們在哪裡跟他們還有他們的朋友聊天.
We were there chatting with them and their friends.

S.FORM: yau kaputna mazmun yau 'nay tengan XXXX iza 'nay napawanna ti panay.
S.PHON: jau kaputna maz~rmun jau ʔnaj təŋan **** iz~ra ʔnaj napawanna ti panaj.
S.FORM: yau kaputna mazmun yau 'nay tengan XXXX iza 'nay napawanna ti panay.
S.PHON: jau kaputna maz~rmun jau ʔnaj təŋan **** iz~ra ʔnaj napawanna ti panaj.

TRANSL.notes: 他們的朋友很多, 還包括姐姐Panay, 就是他的(Tipil的)太太.

S.TRANSL: 他們的朋友很多, 還包括姐姐Panay, 就是他的 太太.

TRANSL.notes: They have many friends, also including the sister-in-law, Panay, his (Tipil's) wife.

S.TRANSL: They have many friends, also including the sister-in-law, Panay, his wife.

S.FORM: tipanay an nani azu yau lawal si qawtuka uman zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: tipanaj an nani az~ru jau rawar si qawtuka uman z~rinnaiku nani.
S.FORM: tipanay an nani azu yau lawal si qawtuka uman zinnaiku nani.
S.PHON: tipanaj an nani az~ru jau rawar si qawtuka uman z~rinnaiku nani.
S.TRANSL: Tipil跟我說,如果有時間的話,就再來喔.

TRANSL.notes: Tipil said to me, "If (you) have time, come (to visit me) again."

S.TRANSL: Tipil said to me, "If have time, come again."

S.FORM: kwa zinku.
S.PHON: kwa z~rinku.
S.FORM: kwa zinku.
S.PHON: kwa z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我說好.
I said, "Okay."

S.FORM: tengnesti qaya mai matiw pilayti 'nay.
S.PHON: təŋnəsti qaja mai matiw pirajti ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tengnesti qaya mai matiw pilayti 'nay.
S.PHON: təŋnəsti qaja mai matiw pirajti ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: 我也很久沒去了, (跑那麼遠去)很累阿.

S.TRANSL: 我也很久沒去了, 很累阿.

TRANSL.notes: It's been a long time since I went there last time as (going that far to visit him) is tiring.

S.TRANSL: It's been a long time since I went there last time as is tiring.

S.FORM: taRaw m taRaw anemna sayza tu mana mai mawtu 'nay sunis zau tmita timaikuan zinna ya.
S.PHON: taʁaw m taʁaw anəmna sajz~ra tu mana mai mawtu ʔnaj sunis z~rau tmita timaikuan z~rinna ja.
S.FORM: taRaw m taRaw anemna sayza tu mana mai mawtu 'nay sunis zau tmita timaikuan zinna ya.
S.PHON: taʁaw m taʁaw anəmna sajz~ra tu mana mai mawtu ʔnaj sunis z~rau tmita timaikuan z~rinna ja.
S.TRANSL: 他也許會心痛, 想說為什麼這孩子不來看我呢?
Maybe that would hurt his heart, making him wonder why this child would not come to see me.

S.FORM: en.
S.PHON: ən.
S.FORM: en.
S.PHON: ən.
S.TRANSL: 對.
Yes.

S.FORM: nayau zuma matiwiku ta takilung nani matiwiku talepawan na qaqa tiangaw.
S.PHON: najau z~ruma matiwiku ta takiruŋ nani matiwiku tarəpawan na qaqa tiaŋaw.
S.FORM: nayau zuma matiwiku ta takilung nani matiwiku talepawan na qaqa tiangaw.
S.PHON: najau z~ruma matiwiku ta takiruŋ nani matiwiku tarəpawan na qaqa tiaŋaw.
S.TRANSL: 比方說我去基隆, 我去Angaw哥哥那邊的時候.

TRANSL.notes: For example, (when) I go to Keelong, (that is), I go to brother Angaw's place.

S.TRANSL: For example, I go to Keelong, , I go to brother Angaw's place.

S.FORM: kaw mana wama aisu mawtuay.
S.PHON: kaw mana wama aisu mawtuaj.
S.FORM: kaw mana wama aisu mawtuay.
S.PHON: kaw mana wama aisu mawtuaj.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼來的只有你呢?
Why is it that the one who came was you only?

S.FORM: mana mai mawtu tiamuy qanibuya.
S.PHON: mana mai mawtu tiamuj qaniβuja.
S.FORM: mana mai mawtu tiamuy qanibuya.
S.PHON: mana mai mawtu tiamuj qaniβuja.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼Amuy和Buya他們那些人沒有來呢?

TRANSL.notes: Why didn't (those guys such as) Amuy and Buya come as well?'

S.TRANSL: Why didn't Amuy and Buya come as well?'

S.FORM: tyatyana aita kebalan mai mautu mlawut timaikuan nazau.
S.PHON: tjatjana aita kəβaran mai mautu mrawut timaikuan naz~rau.
S.FORM: tyatyana aita kebalan mai mautu mlawut timaikuan nazau.
S.PHON: tjatjana aita kəβaran mai mautu mrawut timaikuan naz~rau.
S.TRANSL: 那些人不來拜訪我.
They don't come to visit me.

S.FORM: Rayngutiiku smaqay.
S.PHON: ʁajŋutiiku smaqaj.
S.FORM: Rayngutiiku smaqay.
S.PHON: ʁajŋutiiku smaqaj.
S.TRANSL: 我不會走路了.
I cannot walk.

S.FORM: pilayti ma.
S.PHON: pirajti ma.
S.FORM: pilayti ma.
S.PHON: pirajti ma.
S.TRANSL: 只是有點累.
I'm a bit tired.

S.FORM: Raynguiku Rayngutiiku tu lazan en zinna en.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuiku ʁajŋutiiku tu raz~ran ən z~rinna ən.
S.FORM: Raynguiku Rayngutiiku tu lazan en zinna en.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuiku ʁajŋutiiku tu raz~ran ən z~rinna ən.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道路, 他這樣說.

TRANSL.notes: I don't know the way (to your palce), said he.

S.TRANSL: I don't know the way , said he.

S.FORM: nayauti quniakita sanuakati qaniyau nanlepaw tayan qawman qawtuti mlawut zinku.
S.PHON: najauti quniakita sanuakati qanijau nanrəpaw tajan qawman qawtuti mrawut z~rinku.
S.FORM: nayauti quniakita sanuakati qaniyau nanlepaw tayan qawman qawtuti mlawut zinku.
S.PHON: najauti quniakita sanuakati qanijau nanrəpaw tajan qawman qawtuti mrawut z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我說 '好, 我會跟他們說, 叫他們一定要來拜訪.'

TRANSL.notes: I said, 'All right, I'll tell them to come. They must come to visit (you).'

S.TRANSL: I said, 'All right, I'll tell them to come. They must come to visit .'

S.FORM: ta taRniiku tu mai sunis a yau mlawut tu naquni qawman matiwita nani.
S.PHON: ta taʁniiku tu mai sunis a jau mrawut tu naquni qawman matiwita nani.
S.FORM: ta taRniiku tu mai sunis a yau mlawut tu naquni qawman matiwita nani.
S.PHON: ta taʁniiku tu mai sunis a jau mrawut tu naquni qawman matiwita nani.
S.TRANSL: 我怎麼知道小孩如何拜訪的. 我們真的去的話.
How do I know how children go visiting. If we do go.

S.FORM: o maiimu mlawut qawman zinna timaita haw.
S.PHON: * maiimu mrawut qawman z~rinna timaita haw.
S.FORM: o maiimu mlawut qawman zinna timaita haw.
S.PHON: * maiimu mrawut qawman z~rinna timaita haw.
S.TRANSL: 他絕對會跟我們說, "你們怎麼都沒有來"

TRANSL.notes: He will absolutely tell us, "Why didn't you visit (me)?"

S.TRANSL: He will absolutely tell us, "Why didn't you visit ?"

S.FORM: maiita nayau.
S.PHON: maiita najau.
S.FORM: maiita nayau.
S.PHON: maiita najau.

TRANSL.notes: 我們沒有(去), 就那樣.

S.TRANSL: 我們沒有 , 就那樣.

TRANSL.notes: We didn't (go), and that's it.

S.TRANSL: We didn't , and that's it.

S.FORM: wantima 'nay sabaqiananta tazian 'nay zana Raqit XXXX qaqata zinku.
S.PHON: wantima ʔnaj saβaqiananta taz~rian ʔnaj z~rana ʁaqit **** qaqata z~rinku.
S.FORM: wantima 'nay sabaqiananta tazian 'nay zana Raqit XXXX qaqata zinku.
S.PHON: wantima ʔnaj saβaqiananta taz~rian ʔnaj z~rana ʁaqit **** qaqata z~rinku.

TRANSL.notes: 我想我們在這邊的長輩只剩下他(Tipil)了.

S.TRANSL: 我想我們在這邊的長輩只剩下他 了.
We only have him as our elder here, I think.

S.FORM: en maqenti 'nay pataz tasaw saleqiawita tazian.
S.PHON: ən maqənti ʔnaj pataz~r tasaw sarəqiawita taz~rian.
S.FORM: en maqenti 'nay pataz tasaw saleqiawita tazian.
S.PHON: ən maqənti ʔnaj pataz~r tasaw sarəqiawita taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 是阿, 的確是這樣, 我們每年都在這裡跳舞.
Yes, we dance here every year.

S.FORM: bulaankuti qaya tu saqawtuan tu iza tu.
S.PHON: βuraankuti qaja tu saqawtuan tu iz~ra tu.
S.FORM: bulaankuti qaya tu saqawtuan tu iza tu.
S.PHON: βuraankuti qaja tu saqawtuan tu iz~ra tu.
S.TRANSL: 我也給他邀請卡.

S.FORM: quniaka tmud.

S.PHON: az~ru jau taqsian nani tuɮ z~rinku nəŋiti satuʁin anəmku tmuɮ timaimu z~rinku.

Only if there are places for learning would it be convenient for me to teach. 'I'm willing to teach you,' I said.'

TRANSL.notes: They said, 'Oh, what should we do? Teach us two or three (sentences).'

S.TRANSL: They said, 'Oh, what should we do? Teach us two or three .'

S.FORM: azuti siRab qataban tayan titaika ya.

For instance, take a look at the Qataban festival that took place the other day.

S.FORM: yautiimi tayan ti tidungi kwa ta 'nay masusulun timaimuan nani.
S.PHON: jautiimi tajan ti tiɮuŋi kwa ta ʔnaj masusurun timaimuan nani.

S.TRANSL: 我們在那裡跟dungi一起, 就是你們常跟他在一起的那個dungi.
We were there with dungi, whom you often get together with.

S.FORM: a akwa satzayka zinna tu zana kebalan yautiimi kaysa satzay zana kebalan.

S.TRANSL: 他們說「快點來唱噶瑪蘭的歌!」於是我們就開始唱噶瑪蘭的歌了.
They said, 'Hurry up! Sing the Kavalan songs.' So we started to sing the Kavalan songs.

S.FORM: tu mRayngu mana nayauimu ya a kyunumi Rayngu sikwama.
S.PHON: tu mʁajŋu mana najauimu ja a kjunumi ʁajŋu sikwama.

S.PHON: tu mʁajŋu mana najauimu ja a kjunumi ʁajŋu sikwama.
S.TRANSL: 不知道為什麼你們的發音會那樣,你們都不會說.
I don't know why you guys's pronunciation turned out to be like this. You guys cannot speak.

S.FORM: maiimi nayau kebalan ya.
S.PHON: maiimi najau kəβaran ja.
S.FORM: maiimi nayau kebalan ya.
S.PHON: maiimi najau kəβaran ja.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭人才不會那樣.
We Kavalan are not like that.

S.FORM: man usiqkisay XXXX msikawma nani supeRtiimi.
S.PHON: man usiqkisaj **** msikawma nani supəʁtiimi.
S.FORM: man usiqkisay XXXX msikawma nani supeRtiimi.
S.PHON: man usiqkisaj **** msikawma nani supəʁtiimi.
S.TRANSL: 只要說了一次, 我們就懂了.
As long as it's spoken once, we'd understand it.

S.FORM: man man zipun man Rulam man kizaya man niana supeRimu sikawmaan zinna.
S.PHON: man man z~ripun man ʁuram man kiz~raja man niana supəʁimu sikawmaan z~rinna.
S.FORM: man man zipun man Rulam man kizaya man niana supeRimu sikawmaan zinna.
S.PHON: man man z~ripun man ʁuram man kiz~raja man niana supəʁimu sikawmaan z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: 不管是說日語,國語,阿美語,還是任何語言其他語言. 他們說「你們(噶瑪蘭)都會說」.'

S.TRANSL: 不管是說日語,國語,阿美語,還是任何語言其他語言. 他們說「你們 都會說」.'

TRANSL.notes: (Whether it is) Japanese, Mandarin, Amis, or any other languges. They said, 'you (Kavalan) are good at speaking languages.'

S.TRANSL: Japanese, Mandarin, Amis, or any other languges. They said, 'you are good at speaking languages.'

S.FORM: u maqen satuRinimu kebalan zinnaiku.
S.PHON: u maqən satuʁinimu kəβaran z~rinnaiku.
S.FORM: u maqen satuRinimu kebalan zinnaiku.

S.TRANSL: 他們跟我說 「哇, 你們噶瑪蘭人真的很厲害捏.」
They said to me, 'Wow, you Kavalan people are really skillful.'

S.TRANSL: 他們說「我們打算要學噶瑪蘭語」.
They said, 'We are going to learn the Kavalan language.'

S.FORM: kwa ya qatiwpaimi taqsi zinnaiku.

S.FORM: kwa ya qatiwpaimi taqsi zinnaiku.

They said to me, 'Okay, we're going to learn.'

S.FORM: nengiti ya aisu patuday nengiti.
S.PHON: nəŋiti ja aisu patuɮaj nəŋiti.
S.FORM: nengiti ya aisu patuday nengiti.

S.FORM: nayau qaniyau mazmun iza tudimi zinna.

S.FORM: nayau qaniyau mazmun iza tudimi zinna.

S.FORM: naquni nisikawmaannumi Raynguimi mipil zinna.

S.FORM: naquni nisikawmaannumi Raynguimi mipil zinna.

S.FORM: u kaya XXXX satuRinita kebalan zinku yu.

I think we Kavalan people are quite competent.

S.TRANSL: That's true. can respond to any languages of others.

S.FORM: maqen maiita qaqimannungan sayzi.

S.FORM: m nayau a wawayta na kebalan satuRin.

S.FORM: m nayau a wawayta na kebalan satuRin.

S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭人的舉止就是像那樣, 非常能幹.
So that's the way we Kavalan behave. We're very competent.

S.TRANSL: 他們以前耕田,沒有時間.
They tilled the land in the past and did not have time.

S.FORM: mai tu dawad matiw sa lazing.

S.FORM: mai tu dawad matiw sa lazing.
S.PHON: mai tu ɮawaɮ matiw sa raz~riŋ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有時間去海邊.

S.TRANSL: did not have time to go to the sea.

S.FORM: tu mai tu patuday tu qatiw sa lazing.

S.FORM: tu mai tu patuday tu qatiw sa lazing.

TRANSL.notes: 又沒有人教他們去海邊(撿什麼) .

S.TRANSL: 又沒有人教他們去海邊 .

TRANSL.notes: There was no one who could teach them (what they should pick up when) going to the sea.

S.TRANSL: There was no one who could teach them going to the sea.

S.FORM: tu naqunianta ni sianguzusan.
S.PHON: tu naqunianta ni siaŋuz~rusan.
S.FORM: tu naqunianta ni sianguzusan.
S.PHON: tu naqunianta ni siaŋuz~rusan.
S.TRANSL: 撿回來的東西怎麼處理?
How did we do with what we picked at sea?

S.TRANSL: 他們拿回來的東西,他們不會醃.

S.TRANSL: 石鱉的殼就掉落了,只有剩下肉了.
There were no shells but only meat.
